summary: Meta-M5.5 reasoning profile guidance is approved. All three acceptance criteria pass: (1) deeper reasoning is explicitly recommended per-role for complex design, architecture, and review work in docs/REASONING_PROFILES.md; (2) ordinary collaboration remains lightweight by default — the document opens with this principle and enumerates a 'When deeper reasoning is not needed' section; (3) no global always-on heavy mode is required — the non-interference rule explicitly prohibits a global setting and requires task-scoped invocation. code-reviewer approved with no blocking issues. The document is registered in capabilities/project-capabilities.yaml under docs.REASONING_PROFILES (required: true) and included in the default profile's include_docs list.
